label: Biome plant record
description: A plant that can appear in a biome or tile mutator, with a relative commonality. The element name is the ThingDef defName (the 'plant' field); scalar text is the commonality.

plant.label: Plant
plant.description: ThingDef of the plant. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight controlling how often this plant appears. Populated from XML scalar text by the keyedObjectList loader.
